name: d2d_bad_crc
description: A D2D frame arriving with a deliberately corrupted CRC32 must be flagged by the per-decision receipt path and must not advance the long-horizon Blake3 anchor. This vector pins the expected behaviour of `src/crc32_receipt.v` + `src/multi_tile_receipt.v` under a single-bit payload flip.

frame_under_test.note: Values are illustrative; vector pins behaviour, not bit positions.

blake3_anchor.rationale: Long-horizon anchor must not absorb invalid frames.

anti_claim: If the multi-tile receipt counter advances or the Blake3 anchor mutates while CRC_MISMATCH is flagged, the implementation violates TN-D2D-04.
